# Ajolote Labs — Full Reference

## What Ajolote Labs builds

Ajolote Labs is a forward-deployed AI infrastructure team. We embed engineers
inside operations-heavy companies and build the systems that turn manual
operations into AI-driven ones.

The work happens in three layers, in order:

1. **The Brain** — a unified, MCP-readable context layer over the tools the
   client already pays for. We don't replace the stack; we make it readable
   and act-on-able to AI in one interface. Privacy, consent, and audit
   controls are wired in from day one (LFPDPPP / NOM-024 / equivalent).
2. **AI Employees** — agents that run 24/7 against the brain. Booking,
   forecasting, reconciling, negotiating, reporting — agents do the work
   across the toolset, controlled in natural language, with outcome-tied
   metrics.
3. **Power Users** — the client's own team learns to command, customize, and
   deploy new agents themselves. The system compounds inside the company
   instead of staying dependent on Ajolote.

This is the Forward-Deployed Engineer (FDE) playbook — Palantir's, applied
to AI infrastructure.

## Who it's for

Operations-heavy companies whose competitive surface is execution speed:
trade & distribution, financial services / fintech, healthcare ops, agriculture,
consumer brands, industrial SMEs. We focus on Mexico-based engagements first,
with the brain stack designed to be exportable.

## Engagements

### Cross-Border Spirits (TRADE & DISTRIBUTION)

A spirits CPG brand exporting to the US, working through US distributors and
retailer networks. The cross-border supply chain has compounding inefficiencies
— retailer pricing variance, distributor reorder lag, inventory misallocation,
SKU-by-region demand misforecasts.

We built the infrastructure and brain that detects these inefficiencies across
the chain. Three AI agents deployed against the brain handle reorder
recommendations, retailer pricing audits, and demand-signal harvesting. Thirty
automations sit on top — daily, weekly, and event-triggered.

Outcome: $500K+ in revenue unlocked across the engagement.

### Loyalty Platform (ENTERPRISE B2B)

A consumer-facing loyalty platform under operating pressure. Led an AI-native
turnaround: stood up the company brain, deployed three AI agents that detect
new repeatable workflows, automate them, and compound in capability over time.

The pattern is "agents that find their own work" — they observe the team,
flag candidate workflows, and propose automations. Forty-six automations
shipped to date; 40 hours/month of operator time freed.

## How engagements run

Five stages, every engagement, no exceptions:

1. **Discovery** — map the stack, the team, the failure modes, the regulatory
   constraints. Output: an operations blueprint.
2. **Node Setup** — build the brain (the unified MCP layer over the existing
   stack). The internal node is what makes the AI tier portable.
3. **Agents** — first 1–3 AI employees deployed against the brain. Outcome-
   tied metrics from the start.
4. **Outward MCP** — the brain exposes capabilities outward to other systems
   the client integrates with. This is what turns the engagement from "useful
   internally" to "moat externally."
5. **Maintain** — Ajolote stays. Maintenance is the business model. We don't
   hand off and walk away.

## Team

Pablo Creel + 2 AI Engineers (forward-deployed). The AI Engineers compete
structurally — race to deliver, race to extract reusable library code, race
to land the next engagement. Hires routed through Soy Henry.

## Stack

Python, LangChain, RAG, MCP, n8n / LangGraph, Claude Code CLI. Brain runs
on Cloudflare or client-owned infra depending on data residency requirements.

## How to engage

A 30-minute discovery call is the entry point: book at
https://calendly.com/hello-ajolotelabs.

The call includes a free operations audit, an ROI projection before any
commit, and no contracts until results are visible.

## Contact

- Discovery call — https://calendly.com/hello-ajolotelabs
- Email — hello@ajolotelabs.ai
- Site — https://ajolotelabs.ai
